sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63676" key="lixno/graus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λιχνό-γραυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾱος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n63676.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">greedy old woman</tr_>, Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0118.tlg001:38:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
